_comment: Maps known wrong file paths to their canonical equivalents. Add entries whenever a wrong-path mistake is made.

wrong_paths.reason: Root index.html is the OLD Standard/Premium 2-tier layout. public/index.html is the CURRENT 3-tier Starter/Professional/Business page. Always use public/.
Root index.html is the OLD Standard/Premium 2-tier layout. public/index.html is the CURRENT 3-tier page.
Legacy template path. All Retell agent source now lives in retell-iac/components/ (split architecture). Never edit legacy templates.

wrong_paths.canonical: Retell list-calls API (call data) or monthly_billing_snapshot (billing rollup)
wrong_paths.reason: hvac_call_log and all hvac_call_log_* tables were dropped 2026-04-09. Retell is the source of truth for call data.

wrong_paths.canonical: Railway REST API: https://n8n.syntharra.com/api/v1/ with X-N8N-API-KEY header
wrong_paths.reason: n8n MCP talks to a cloud account Syntharra does not use. Always use Railway REST API directly.
